NIS2.Article_21: Measures for a high common level of cybersecurity across the Union (Supply Chain Risk & Access Control).

EU_AI_Act.Article_10: Data and data governance requirements for high-risk AI systems.

GDPR.Article_28: Processor obligations, requiring strict access control and least-privilege principles.
GDPR.Article_32: Security of processing, mandating the encryption of personal data at rest and in transit.

deterministic_mapping.description: Ensure all data stored in the S3 bucket is securely encrypted at rest.
deterministic_mapping.remediation_mandate: Enforce AES-256 or AWS KMS encryption on the storage bucket to satisfy GDPR data-at-rest encryption mandates.

deterministic_mapping.description: Disallow IAM roles, users, and groups from using the AWS AdministratorAccess policy (Wildcard * permissions).
deterministic_mapping.remediation_mandate: Remove wildcard (*) resource permissions and explicitly scope access to specific Amazon Resource Names (ARNs) to satisfy GDPR least-privilege processor obligations.

deterministic_mapping.description: Ensure Kubernetes Secrets are encrypted using a managed Key Management Service.
deterministic_mapping.remediation_mandate: Implement an explicit EncryptionConfiguration resource for the etcd cluster handling Kubernetes secrets.

deterministic_mapping.description: Ensure Cloud SQL database instances do not have public IP addresses.
deterministic_mapping.remediation_mandate: Remove the public IP configuration from the database instance and mandate private VPC peering for AI training data pipelines to prevent public exposure.

deterministic_mapping.description: Ensure that S3 bucket has cross-region replication enabled.
deterministic_mapping.remediation_mandate: Enable cross-region replication on the S3 bucket to ensure high availability and disaster recovery compliance under NIS2 mandates.

deterministic_mapping.description: Ensure that 'Network Access' to Azure SQL database is restricted.
deterministic_mapping.remediation_mandate: Configure virtual network rules to restrict access to the Azure SQL database, satisfying GDPR data isolation requirements.
